_doc: OJ-05 — three-turn collection (local verify profile). Turn 1/2 allow COMPLETED plain-text fallback. Turn 2 wording blocks default-Shenzhen assumption to reduce premature trip delegation. Turn 3 is self-contained so a fresh A2A task (after turn-2 COMPLETED) can complete mainplan→trip→hotel in one trip call. Turn 3 timeout raised for full-chain LLM + remote delegation.

turns.text: 出差3天，下周二出发。出发城市还没定，不是深圳，请先继续追问，不要调用行程规划。
从上海出发。差标：每晚不超过 800 元、最低 4 星。偏好：国贸附近，需要会议室。请据此完成完整行程规划。
